narrative:
Deer Park 3-A (precinct in Hamilton County) has 995 registered voters, with 57.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
